hero.title: Never miss a live show from the bands you love.
hero.subtitle: Just follow your favorite artists and we'll automatically collect live schedules nationwide.

cta.loginHint: Already have an account? Log in

welcome.guestFriendly: Try it without creating an account

error.login: Failed to start login. Please try again.

signup.title: Create Your Account
signup.description:
Great job completing onboarding!
Create a secure account with Passkey
to save the artists you follow.
signup.error: Account creation failed. Please try again.

userHome.title: Select Your Home Area
userHome.description: The HOME STAGE shows lives in your home area. Where do you live?

coachMark.viewArtists: Check out your artist list too!

empty.title: No upcoming events
empty.subtitle: Follow more artists to see their live schedules here.

notification.title: Never miss a live event
notification.description: Get notified when new concerts are found for artists you follow.

blocked.title: Notifications blocked
blocked.description: To receive concert alerts, enable notifications in your browser settings for this site.

pwa.title: Add to Home Screen
pwa.description: Install Liverty Music for faster access and offline browsing.

pwaFab.sheetAriaLabel: How to add to home screen
pwaFab.step1: Tap the Share button (□↑) at the bottom of Safari

hypeExplanation.title: Notification Scope
hypeExplanation.description: Your hype level controls which concert notifications you receive.
hypeExplanation.home: Notified when concerts are in your home area

empty.title: No artists followed yet
empty.subtitle: Discover and follow artists to see them here.

spotlight.setHypeMessage: Raise the hype for artists you never want to miss

signupBanner.message: Save your followed artists and get concert notifications.

discovery.popoverGuide: Tap artists you want to follow to get their live concert updates
discovery.loadFailed: Failed to load artists. Tap retry to try again.
discovery.retryFailed: Still unable to load artists. Please try again later.
discovery.followFailed: Failed to follow {{name}}. Please try again.
discovery.similarArtistsUnavailable: No more similar artists available for {{name}}

errorBanner.reportCooldown: Please wait before reporting another issue

settings.title: Settings
settings.resendError: Failed to send verification email. Please try again.
settings.resendRateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later.

postSignup.title: Account registration complete!
postSignup.hypeGuideLabel: Change hype on the My Artists page to control which notifications you receive
postSignup.notificationError: Failed to enable notifications. Check your browser settings.
postSignup.notificationDenied: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings. You can change this in your browser.
postSignup.pwaLabel: Add to home screen for a better experience

discovery.title: Follow Artists
discovery.description: Tap a bubble to follow an artist. Unfollow from the My Artists page.
discovery.genreTip: Filter by genre using the tabs
discovery.searchTip: Search by name using the search bar

dashboard.title: Reading the Timetable
dashboard.description: Your followed artists' lives are shown by distance.
dashboard.cardTip: Tap a card to see concert details

myArtists.title: About Hype Levels
myArtists.description: Hype level controls how far away you get notified. Tap a dot to change it.
myArtists.tip: Start by setting artists you're curious about to Home — you'll get notified when they play nearby.
myArtists.longPressTip: Long-press an artist row to see the unfollow confirmation.
